briefdescription.para: Parse a signed integer from a string.
Parse a JSON string starting at p.

detaileddescription.para: Must point to opening '"'. Null-terminates in-place.

simplesect.para: Pointer past the closing '"', or NULL on error.

detaileddescription.para: Tokenizes key-value pairs at the given depth.
Tokenizes the JSON into key-value pairs. Modifies the input buffer (inserts null terminators at string boundaries).

briefdescription.para: Find a token by key name.

detaileddescription.para: Use dot notation for nested keys: "wifi.ssid"

simplesect.para: Pointer to token, or NULL if not found.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_JsonReader *r, const char *key, char *out, size_t out_sz)
memberdef.name: syn_json_get_str

briefdescription.para: Get a string value by key.

simplesect.para: true if key found and value is a string.

briefdescription.para: Get an integer value by key.

simplesect.para: true if key found and value is a number.

briefdescription.para: Get a boolean value by key.

simplesect.para: true if key found and value is a boolean.

briefdescription.para: Check if a key exists and is null.

simplesect.para: true if key exists and value is null.

briefdescription.para: Get the type of a value by key.

simplesect.para: SYN_JsonType, or SYN_JSON_NONE if not found.
